title: Vendor access telemetry — principals active outside contracted hours/geos
exclusions: Does NOT measure vendor-supplied service outages; focuses on vendor principals acting against the estate.
evidence: Saved search 'vendor_access_off_contract' (hourly) emits vendor principals acting outside contracted windows or permitted geographies.

compliance.assurance_rationale: DORA Art.28 ICT third-party oversight explicitly requires telemetry of third-party access.
NIS2 supply-chain risk-management extends to vendor access.
SR-6 supplier assessments and reviews include telemetry.

controlTest.positiveScenario: Vendor principal vendor_abc@x logs in at 03:00 UTC on Sunday from a geography not on the contract's permitted list; the UC fires.
controlTest.negativeScenario: Same principal during contracted weekday hours from the expected geography; no alert.

dataSources: IdP authentication events for named vendor principals, vendor contracts lookup with contracted hours/geos.
spl:
index=idp earliest=-1h (sourcetype=okta:audit OR sourcetype=azuread:audit) result=success
| search user IN (`vendor_principals`)
| `get_geolocation(src_ip)`
| lookup vendor_contract.csv user OUTPUT allowed_hours allowed_countries
| eval hour=strftime(_time,"%H"), weekday=strftime(_time,"%A"), window_ok=if(match(allowed_hours,weekday.":".hour),1,0), geo_ok=if(match(allowed_countries,country),1,0)
| where window_ok=0 OR geo_ok=0
| table _time user country hour weekday allowed_countries allowed_hours
description: Intersects vendor principal authentication events with contracted access windows (hours/days) and permitted geographies; divergence is a DORA Art.28 finding.
value: Materialises contractual access controls into operational telemetry.
implementation: (1) Maintain vendor_principals macro; (2) extract contracted windows/geos from contracts and publish to vendor_contract.csv; (3) run hourly.
visualization: World map of vendor logins with off-geo markers, bar chart of vendors over time, single-value 'vendor logins within contract (24h)'.

references.title: MITRE ATT&CK — T1078.004 Valid Accounts: Cloud Accounts

knownFalsePositives: Planned after-hours maintenance windows need a pre-declared exception with vendor_contract.exception_id.
